description.value: You have trained to use the shield as the weapon it always was.

system.benefits:
You may make a shield bash as a [Combat] action using Strength + Melee Combat instead of Agility + Melee Combat. Damage is based on shield size:

  • Buckler: [[/damage 4 type=bludgeoning]] damage
  • Medium shields (Targe, Heater): [[/damage 6 type=bludgeoning]] damage
  • Heavy shields (Kite, Tower, Pavise): [[/damage 8 type=bludgeoning]] damage. On Margin 2, the target is knocked Prone in addition to taking damage.
